# NAV AiDE — GitHub Pages Marketing Site

Use this prompt in Copilot Agent mode to build the static GitHub Pages site only.

## Goal

Create a fast, mobile-responsive landing page in the repository-root `docs/` directory for NAV AiDE.

Do not create the GitHub Pages site inside `nav-aide-copilot-kit/docs/`. GitHub Pages should be able to publish from `main` -> `/docs`.

## Required sections

- Hero with product name and tagline: "Your AI London guide. Works underground."
- Problem statement
- Solution overview
- Feature highlights:
  - 140+ languages
  - offline maps
  - door-to-door directions
  - LOST? helper
- screenshot/mockup placeholder section
- coming soon / email signup placeholder section
- footer with AiDEMAIN Ltd. and required attributions

## Technical constraints

- Static HTML + CSS only
- No JS framework
- Keep copy aligned with MVP scope
- Optimize for GitHub Pages publishing from the repository-root `docs/`

## Acceptance criteria

- repository-root `docs/index.html`
- repository-root `docs/style.css`
- placeholder asset structure
- footer includes required attributions
